name: ABBOTT LABORATORIES
summary: Abbott Laboratories, incorporated in Illinois in 1900, discovers, develops, manufactures, and sells a broad line of healthcare products across four segments: Established Pharmaceutical Products (branded generics sold in emerging markets), Diagnostic Products (laboratory, molecular, and point-of-care systems), Nutritional Products (infant and adult nutrition such as Similac and Ensure), and Medical Devices (cardiovascular devices, FreeStyle Libre CGM, and neuromodulation products).

products.name: FreeStyle Libre
products.description: Continuous glucose monitoring system with sensors, software, and accessories for diabetes management.

products.name: Alinity
products.description: Family of core laboratory instruments for immunoassay, clinical chemistry, hematology, and molecular diagnostics.

products.name: BinaxNOW
products.description: Rapid lateral flow testing platform for infectious diseases including SARS-CoV-2.

products.name: ID NOW
products.description: Rapid molecular point-of-care system for SARS-CoV-2, influenza A & B, RSV, and strep A.

products.name: MitraClip
products.description: Transcatheter edge-to-edge repair system for mitral valve treatment.

products.name: TriClip
products.description: Transcatheter edge-to-edge repair system for tricuspid valve treatment.

products.name: HeartMate
products.description: Left ventricular assist device family for heart failure treatment.

products.name: CardioMEMS HF System
products.description: Pulmonary artery sensor system for heart failure monitoring.

products.name: Aveir
products.description: Single-chamber and dual-chamber leadless pacemaker systems.

products.name: Volt Pulsed Field Ablation System
products.description: Electrophysiology ablation system for cardiac procedures.

products.name: Proclaim XR
products.description: Recharge-free implantable pulse generator for chronic pain management with BurstDR stimulation.

products.name: Infinity DBS
products.description: Non-rechargeable deep brain stimulation system with directional lead technology for movement disorders.

products.name: Liberta RC DBS
products.description: Rechargeable deep brain stimulation system with directional lead technology for movement disorders.

products.name: XIENCE
products.description: Drug-eluting coronary stent system developed on the Multi-Link Vision platform.

products.name: Navitor
products.description: Transcatheter aortic heart valve replacement system.

products.name: Tendyne
products.description: Transcatheter mitral valve replacement system.

products.name: Ensure
products.description: Adult nutritional supplement product line including Ensure Plus, Ensure Max Protein, and Ensure High Protein.

products.name: Similac
products.description: Infant and follow-on formula product line including multiple specialized formulations.

products.name: PediaSure
products.description: Pediatric nutritional supplement products including PediaSure Peptide.

products.name: Glucerna
products.description: Nutritional products for people with diabetes available in consumer and institutional forms.

products.name: Pedialyte
products.description: Oral electrolyte solution for hydration and rehydration.

products.name: Creon
products.description: Gastroenterology product for treatment of pancreatic exocrine insufficiency.

products.name: Synthroid
products.description: Cardiovascular and metabolic product for treatment of hypothyroidism.

products.name: i-STAT Alinity
products.description: Point-of-care system with cartridges for blood gas, chemistry, electrolytes, coagulation, and immunoassay testing.

products.name: Lingo CGM
products.description: Continuous glucose monitoring system with sensors and software for general health and wellness.

products.name: Esprit BTK
products.description: Everolimus eluting resorbable scaffold system for below-the-knee vascular treatment.

products.name: AlinIQ
products.description: Suite of informatics tools and professional services for laboratory automation solutions.

products.name: Diamondback 360
products.description: Coronary and peripheral orbital atherectomy systems for vascular treatment.

products.name: Amplatzer Amulet
products.description: Left atrial appendage occluder device for stroke risk reduction.
